login.title: EnvSync
login.subtitle: Sync environment variables across your team

success.title: Account created!
success.description: Copy your API token now — it will not be shown again.

tokenLogin.label: API token
tokenLogin.hint: You received this when you first registered.
tokenLogin.invalidFormat: Token must be a 64-character hex string.
tokenLogin.invalidToken: Invalid token. Check that you copied it correctly.

dashboard.title: Projects
dashboard.subtitle: Each project holds your encrypted environment variables.

empty.description: Create a project to start syncing env vars.

createModal.title: New project
createModal.nameHint: Only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.

deleteModal.title: Delete project
deleteModal.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This will permanently remove all its environment variables.

editMode.label: Edit {env} variables
editMode.hint: One KEY=VALUE per line. Lines starting with # are ignored.
editMode.encryptionNote: Values are encrypted with AES-256-GCM before being stored.

footer.encryption: All values are AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest

apiToken.description: Your token is stored locally in this browser. It was shown once at registration — if you've lost it, sign out and register a new account.
apiToken.cliHint: Use this token with the CLI:

dangerZone.signOutDescription: Removes your token from this browser.
